text: Cats are small domesticated carnivorous mammals. They meow, purr, and often live with humans as pets. Cats chase mice and drink milk.
Dogs are domesticated canines. They bark, wag their tails, go for walks, fetch balls, and are commonly kept as companion animals.
Birds such as sparrows and eagles have feathers and wings. Most bird species can fly and build nests.
Tinyann is a C++17 in-memory vector similarity search library with exact, HNSW, IVF, and IVFPQ indexes for approximate nearest neighbor retrieval.
Nanollm is a from-scratch Llama-style LLM inference engine in modern C++ with quantization, tokenizer, sampler, and interactive chat support.
Nanorag combines tinyann retrieval with nanollm generation to answer questions over a local document store using in-house embeddings.
Water freezes at zero degrees Celsius under standard atmospheric pressure and boils at one hundred degrees Celsius.
The Earth orbits the Sun once per year and has one natural satellite called the Moon.
HNSW graphs enable fast approximate k-nearest neighbor search in high dimensional embedding spaces used by RAG systems.
A meowing animal that purrs is typically a cat, not a dog or a bird.
